description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Run tests that triggers on pull request openings, reopens, and edits, as well as on push events. Run a matrix of jobs on ubuntu-latest for Python versions 3.6 through 3.10. In each job, check out the repository, set up the corresponding Python version with pip caching, install Ubuntu and Python dependencies, prepare a Code Climate test reporter, run tests with coverage using pytest, and report the coverage to Code Climate.
